headlines.title: Seadrill Limited Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary
Mammoth Energy Services, Inc. Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary
This Bitcoin Price Engine Just Turned Back On
BitMine Slows Ethereum Purchases
Strategy Buys More Bitcoin Despite Signaling Potential Sales

Monday.com (MNDY) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
Dole (DOLE) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
Uniti (UNIT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
Accendra Health (ACH) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
Major crypto stock surges after BlackRock investment
UK exports to U.S. plunge by 25% after Trump's 'liberation day' tariffs blitz
headlines.desc: The U.K. is now running a trade deficit with its largest trading partner.

headlines.title: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7
headlines.desc: Quietly, shares of Google-parent Alphabet are on the verge of topping $5 trillion, and overtaking AI-leader Nvidia as the world's most valuable company.

headlines.title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

headlines.title: Coinbase posts steep first-quarter loss after slide in crypto prices; shares fall 4%
headlines.desc: Crypto trading platform Coinbase reported a surprise first-quarter loss and weaker-than-estimated revenue after the market close Thursday.

headlines.title: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
headlines.desc: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

headlines.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
headlines.desc: Iran is reported to want lifting of the US naval blockade, recognition of Iranian sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz and compensation for war damage.

headlines.title: Trump's China visit set to test fragile truce
headlines.desc: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce.

headlines.title: Former Qatar PM: Netanyahu using Iran war to reshape Middle East
headlines.desc: Sheikh Hamad bin Jassim warns Strait of Hormuz crisis is most dangerous fallout of war on Iran, calls for 'Gulf NATO'.

headlines.title: Iran war effect: Why is Modi asking Indians to avoid foreign trips, gold?
headlines.desc: PM urges Indians to work from home and avoid foreign trips during the global energy crisis due to the Iran war.

headlines.title: Lumentum builds on its scorching stock rally after earning a spot in this hot index
headlines.desc: Lumentum’s stock performance ranks fifth in the S&P 500 this year. Now the optical company is set to join the Nasdaq-100.

headlines.title: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates
headlines.desc: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.

headlines.title: Iren’s stock pulls back as investors assess the steep price of the AI buildout
headlines.desc: Iren will take on debt in the wake of its new Nvidia partnership. One analyst said Monday’s stock drop is an overreaction.

headlines.title: Oil price predicted to remain above $100 for rest of year
headlines.desc: Investment bank JP Morgan expects oil to remain in the "low $100s" even if the Strait of Hormuz were to reopen next month.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.desc: The recommendations and analysis of these Wall Street experts can provide useful insights for stock selection.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for stable income
headlines.desc: Dividend-paying stocks can help cushion downside risk while offering consistent returns.

headlines.title: This 'win-win' hedge trade is getting popular with traders
headlines.desc: The trade is fairly simple: sell downside protection in semiconductor names where volatility is expensive, and buy downside protection in the S&P 500, where it's relatively cheap.

headlines.title: Apple's stock has gone nowhere for 6 months. Traders expect a wild ride Thursday night
headlines.desc: Implied volatility in the stock suggests a 3.5% swing after earnings tonight, compared to an average move of just 1.8% following the last four quarterly reports.

headlines.title: AI boom: Big Tech capital expenditures now seen topping $1 trillion in 2027
headlines.desc: The overall cost has been causing heads to spin, but analysts say they're seeing flowthrough from investments to revenue.
